title: Luxorens Realistic Thunder Sounds
description: The main purpose of the Resource Pack is to change Thunder Sounds and the Rain sounds. That's it.
body:
Another useless Resource Pack from me. Yay!!!



But seriously tho. There are not many Good Resource Packs that changes Weather Ambience or similar things to it. So i've made my own one.



As usual Resource Pack is free to be used on any Modpack but be sure to credit me! (Love yall :3)



Image Pack has been taken somewhere from Reddit.
